channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 MemeCore’s $6B glowup looks shaky as insiders allegedly own most of M. Prove it or the hype crashes. https://Blockchain.News/news/memecore-token-zachxbt-insider-holdings-scrutiny #Meme #Crypto #Tokenomics
